name: Deer

traits.name: Agile
traits.text: The deer doesn’t provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy’s reach.

text:
# Deer

*Medium Beast, Unaligned*

A skittish woodland grazer, quick to bolt.

### Actions

**Ram.** Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.
